description: Everpure, Inc. engages in the business of delivering innovative and disruptive data storage, products, and services that enable customers to maximize the value of data. The firm is also involved in the provision of data storage and management with a mission to redefine the storage experience by simplifying how people consume and interact with data. The company was founded by John M. Hayes and John Colgrove in October 2009 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA.
